name: National Australia Bank Limited
analysis: NAB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$38.7500, stop A$35.1252, target A$44.7785 (1.66:1) — then trail it.
